problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
